_note: SYNTHETIC placeholder golden set — NOT human-verified. Replace with a human-curated sample (section-22) before trusting these accuracy numbers.
_schema: Each row: { id (acquisition_personnel link / pe_person match id), personName, peCode, roleTitle, correct }. `correct` is the analyst verdict for an ACCEPTED person→role attribution. Precision is measured over accepted attributions. A real set is ~50 records verified against the source (DoW directory rev, press release, or hearing witness list); see README.md.
